name: valid_github_config
description: GitHub OAuth2 with all required fields populated

name: valid_google_config
description: Google OAuth2 with all required fields populated

name: empty_client_id_github
description: GitHub OAuth2 with empty client_id should fail validation

name: empty_client_secret_github
description: GitHub OAuth2 with empty client_secret should fail validation

name: both_empty_github
description: GitHub OAuth2 with both client_id and client_secret empty should fail validation

name: empty_client_id_google
description: Google OAuth2 with empty client_id should fail validation

name: empty_client_secret_google
description: Google OAuth2 with empty client_secret should fail validation

name: valid_config_url_has_client_id
description: Valid config should produce auth URL containing client_id
